summary: Iteration 4 testing complete. Verified lesson content enrichment for Portuguese, German, and French. All 180 lessons (5 languages × 6 levels × 6 lessons) have content with 450+ characters of real educational material. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Login, course navigation, and lesson content display all working correctly.

issues: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' - cosmetic warning only, does not affect functionality

seed_data_creation: None - used existing enriched lesson data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All lesson content enrichment verified. Content statistics by language: Spanish (36 lessons, min 643 chars, avg 801), English (36 lessons, min 719 chars, avg 843), Portuguese (36 lessons, min 760 chars, avg 957), German (36 lessons, min 925 chars, avg 1184), French (36 lessons, min 1047 chars, avg 1324). All lessons contain real educational material with grammar rules, vocabulary lists, cultural notes, and example dialogues.
